title: dv plugin per-op responses
description: v1 draft. The stdout JSON payload dv expects from each plugin Op. `dv plugin verify` checks responses against these. See specs/plugin-contract.md.

error.description: Optional structured error any Op may emit on stdout (alongside a non-zero exit).

info.title: info response
info.description: Mandatory metadata. dv invokes this once per plugin per run (cached) to learn the contract version and the op set the plugin implements. Plugins that don't implement an optional op leave it off supportedOps; dv skips ops not declared here.

contractVersion.description: Must match dv's expected version (currently '1'). Mismatch is a hard error.

supportedOps.description: Every op the plugin implements. `discover` is required for the plugin to be useful.

discover.title: discover response
discover.description: Packages this plugin claims under the matched paths.

write-version.title: write-version response
write-version.description: Acknowledgement that the manifest was updated.

update-dependency.title: update-dependency response
update-dependency.description: Acknowledgement that a dependent's constraint was rewritten.

changed.description: Whether a constraint was actually modified (false if not present).

get-dependencies.title: get-dependencies response
get-dependencies.description: Intra-workspace dependencies of this Package. Optional op (declared via info.supportedOps). dv uses the result to topologically order `dv release`'s work list so dependent packages publish *after* the packages they depend on. The returned `dependencies` array is the subset of the `candidates` provided on stdin that this package depends on in any of its manifest fields (runtime, dev, peer — the plugin's call). External deps from public registries are omitted. Plugins that don't implement this op leave it off supportedOps; dv falls back to alphabetical-by-path ordering.

dependencies.description: Strict subset of the `candidates` passed on stdin.

finalize.title: finalize response
finalize.description: Result of the post-write cleanup hook. Lets a plugin refresh generated companion files (lockfiles, etc.) so they ship in the same commit as the manifest edits. Fires once per plugin per `dv version` / `dv v1` run, after every write-version + update-dependency call. dv only invokes finalize when the plugin's info.supportedOps includes it.

additionalChangedFiles.description: Repo-relative paths the plugin touched during finalize. dv stages these alongside the manifest changes for the version commit.
